notes: v374 — Your app now loads market data through YOUR OWN data server (the Cloudflare Worker you set up) instead of the slow free relays. THE PAYOFF: data comes back faster, it’s cached so repeat loads and your other devices are quicker, and your EODData API key now stays on the server — the app no longer sends it out just to load prices. If your server is ever unavailable, the app automatically falls back to the old direct/relay method, so nothing can leave it stuck. Nothing changes in how you use the app. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5).
